For a budget-friendly flight, you might look into our Budget Airlines Economy Class, which typically ranges between €50 and €150 per ticket. We can schedule this trip in early Spring (for example, the March 1-5 slot) to take advantage of off-peak pricing. 

2. Prague, Czech – Known for its charming architecture and entertaining attractions for all ages, Prague is another excellent option. Similar flight options via Budget Airlines allow economical travel with prices in the same range, making it a solid candidate for your itinerary.
